page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7se.16xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor. It features 64 dedicated physical cores operating at a clock speed of 2.9 GHz. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, each of the 64 vCPUs maps directly to a physical core, ensuring dedicated compute allocation without hyperthreading resource sharing.

The server is equipped with 512.0 GB of RAM, providing a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. This high memory density classifies the instance within the memory-optimized spectrum. However, the server does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via external network-attached volumes. Additionally, there are no integrated GPUs, which limits its utility for hardware-accelerated workloads.

Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 16 Gbps. The KVM-virtualized instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated core allocation and high memory density provide a predictable resource profile for memory-bound workloads, though the lack of bundled local storage requires factoring in external storage costs.

Given the 512.0 GB memory capacity and dedicated Intel Xeon cores, this server is configured for memory-intensive applications. Appropriate workloads include large-scale databases, in-memory caching systems, enterprise resource planning applications, and memory-bound data processing tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7se.16xlarge is a memory-optimized server utilizing the x86_64 architecture. It is equipped with an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.9 GHz, delivering 64 dedicated physical cores with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio. The instance features 512.0 GB of RAM, establishing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It operates on the KVM hypervisor and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps. Tradeoffs include the complete absence of local storage and integrated GPUs, requiring external network storage for data persistence. This hardware profile is designed for memory-intensive workloads, such as large databases, in-memory data stores, and enterprise applications requiring dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading overhead.

tagline: A memory-optimized server featuring sixty-four dedicated Intel Xeon cores and five hundred twelve gigabytes of RAM for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.

512.0 GB of RAM providing 8.0 GB per core
No local storage or integrated GPUs included
KVM hypervisor with dedicated CPU allocation
